mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in industrial production signals improving real activity and near-term earnings revisions, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO latest snapshot value 107.3006 as of two months before 2018-07-15
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month INDPRO momentum is followed by nonpositive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of walk-forward observations over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A crossing into faster federal funds tightening raises discount rates and equity risk-premia faster than earnings expectations adjust, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS 3-month change crosses above +0.25 percentage points
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS latest snapshot value 1.82 as of one month before 2018-07-15
failure_condition: Reject if triggered tightening episodes deliver positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if the triggered mean return is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: When consumer prices accelerate while the federal funds rate is rising, markets price a higher probability of restrictive policy and margin pressure, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized growth crosses above 2.5% while FEDFUNDS 3-month change is positive
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL latest snapshot value 250.857 as of one month before 2018-07-15
failure_condition: Reject if the CPIAUCSL-FEDFUNDS interaction has nonnegative average 20-day forward returns or if an interaction term adds no predictive power versus the two single-series effects in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Very low unemployment combined with continued payroll expansion identifies late-cycle labor tightness that pressures wages and supports further tightening, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses below 4.1% while PAYEMS 3-month change is positive
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE latest snapshot value 4.0 as of one month before 2018-07-15
fact:PAYEMS latest snapshot value 148912.0 as of one month before 2018-07-15
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with tight labor markets
failure_condition: Reject if triggered low-unemployment payroll-expansion months have 60-day S&P 500 returns above the unconditional median in more than 60% of walk-forward cases.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp crossing into stronger retail sales growth signals resilient household demand and supports near-term revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS latest snapshot value 501971.0 as of two months before 2018-07-15
failure_condition: Reject if crossing episodes fail to produce positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in at least 53% of observations or if mean triggered return is below zero.

mechanism_narrative: A material decline in housing starts signals weakening interest-rate-sensitive demand and future construction spillovers, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST latest snapshot value 1350.0 as of two months before 2018-07-15
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST decline triggers are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if the downside hit rate is not higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Positive real GDP growth indicates broad demand support for corporate revenues and operating leverage, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days when growth remains above stall speed.
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 latest snapshot value 17371.854 as of six months before 2018-07-15
failure_condition: Reject if above-stall GDPC1 triggers have lower average 60-day S&P 500 returns than below-stall observations over a 5-year walk-forward evaluation.

mechanism_narrative: A sudden rise in unemployment signals deterioration in labor income and recession risk, causing equity investors to lower earnings expectations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE 3-month change crosses above +0.3 percentage points
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE latest snapshot value 4.0 as of one month before 2018-07-15
failure_condition: Reject if unemployment-jump triggers are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases or if triggered returns are not below unconditional returns.
